name: Gordon's Marinated Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 lb Boneless Chicken Breast, cut into 1 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1 inch pieces.
2. In a bowl, combine gin, fresh lime juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Marinate the chicken over night.
3. Place the marinated chicken on skewers (the recipe yields 30-40 pieces).
4. In a large frying pan, heat a little oil. Add the chicken and fry until it is slightly browned.
5. Add the remaining marinade ingredients and cook the chicken until done. Stir in a dash of Tabasco.
6. Serve immediately, garnished with fresh chopped cilantro.
